'''âl-ng-k''' ('''kalangak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mainprise|mainprise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mainprise|mainprise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-ng-k
|-
! Lemma
| kalangak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilangak|thilangak]] || [[word:jilangak|jilangak]] || [[word:shilangak|shilangak]] || [[word:kilangak|kilangak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulangak|thuthulangak]] || [[word:jujulangak|jujulangak]] || [[word:shushulangak|shushulangak]] || [[word:kukulangak|kukulangak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulangak|thulangak]] || [[word:julangak|julangak]] || [[word:shulangak|shulangak]] || [[word:kulangak|kulangak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulangak|thulangak]] || [[word:julangak|julangak]] || [[word:shulangak|shulangak]] || [[word:kulangak|kulangak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelangak|thelangak]] || [[word:jelangak|jelangak]] || [[word:shelangak|shelangak]] || [[word:kelangak|kelangak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholangak|thotholangak]] || [[word:jojolangak|jojolangak]] || [[word:shosholangak|shosholangak]] || [[word:kokolangak|kokolangak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholangak|tholangak]] || [[word:jolangak|jolangak]] || [[word:sholangak|sholangak]] || [[word:kolangak|kolangak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholangak|tholangak]] || [[word:jolangak|jolangak]] || [[word:sholangak|sholangak]] || [[word:kolangak|kolangak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlangak|thĂŠlangak]] || [[word:jĂŠlangak|jĂŠlangak]] || [[word:shĂŠlangak|shĂŠlangak]] || [[word:kĂŠlangak|kĂŠlangak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalangak|thathalangak]] || [[word:jajalangak|jajalangak]] || [[word:shashalangak|shashalangak]] || [[word:kakalangak|kakalangak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalangak|thalangak]] || [[word:jalangak|jalangak]] || [[word:shalangak|shalangak]] || [[word:kalangak|kalangak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalangak|thalangak]] || [[word:jalangak|jalangak]] || [[word:shalangak|shalangak]] || [[word:kalangak|kalangak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalangak|shalangak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalangak|goshalangak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalangak|gokishalangak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalangaknĂŒ|shalangaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalangaknknĂŒ|goshalangaknknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalangaknĂŒ|gokishalangaknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalangakshĂ«|shalangakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalangaknkshĂ«|goshalangaknkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalangakshĂ«|gokishalangakshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalangakro|shalangakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalangaknkro|goshalangaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalangakro|gokishalangakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalangakmu|shalangakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalangaknkmu|goshalangaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalangakmu|gokishalangakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalangaksher|shalangaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalangaknksher|goshalangaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalangaksher|gokishalangaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalangakng|shalangakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalangaknkng|goshalangaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalangakng|gokishalangakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalangakya|shalangakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalangaknkya|goshalangaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalangakya|gokishalangakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalangakyam|shalangakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalangaknkyam|goshalangaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalangakyam|gokishalangakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalangaknĂŒshĂ«|shalangaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalangaknknĂŒshĂ«|goshalangaknknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalangaknĂŒshĂ«|gokishalangaknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalangaknĂŒro|shalangaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalangaknknĂŒro|goshalangaknknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalangaknĂŒro|gokishalangaknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalangaknĂŒmu|shalangaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalangaknknĂŒmu|goshalangaknknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalangaknĂŒmu|gokishalangaknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalangakshĂ«nĂŒ|shalangakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalangaknkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalangaknkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalangakshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalangakshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalangakshĂ«ro|shalangakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalangaknkshĂ«ro|goshalangaknkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalangakshĂ«ro|gokishalangakshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalangakshĂ«mu|shalangakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalangaknkshĂ«mu|goshalangaknkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalangakshĂ«mu|gokishalangakshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalangakronĂŒ|shalangakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalangaknkronĂŒ|goshalangaknkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalangakronĂŒ|gokishalangakronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalangakroshĂ«|shalangakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalangaknkroshĂ«|goshalangaknkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalangakroshĂ«|gokishalangakroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalangakromu|shalangakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalangaknkromu|goshalangaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalangakromu|gokishalangakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalangakmunĂŒ|shalangakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalangaknkmunĂŒ|goshalangaknkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalangakmunĂŒ|gokishalangakmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalangakmushĂ«|shalangakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalangaknkmushĂ«|goshalangaknkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalangakmushĂ«|gokishalangakmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalangakmuro|shalangakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalangaknkmuro|goshalangaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalangakmuro|gokishalangakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
